parameters.query: SELECT fase_cobranca, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(valor_em_aberto) as valor_total, AVG(dias_atraso) as media_dias FROM leads WHERE status NOT IN ('pago','cancelado','arquivado') GROUP BY fase_cobranca ORDER BY CASE fase_cobranca WHEN 'pre' THEN 1 WHEN 'mes1' THEN 2 WHEN 'mes2' THEN 3 WHEN 'mes3' THEN 4 WHEN 'mes4' THEN 5 WHEN 'mes5' THEN 6 WHEN 'pos' THEN 7 END

SELECT DATE(timestamp) as data, tipo, COUNT(*) as enviados, COUNT(CASE WHEN status_entrega = 'entregue' THEN 1 END) as entregues, COUNT(CASE WHEN status_entrega = 'lido' THEN 1 END) as lidos FROM mensagens WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' AND remetente = 'BOT' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

SELECT COUNT(*) as pagamentos_hoje, SUM(valor) as valor_recuperado_hoje, COUNT(CASE WHEN metodo = 'pix' THEN 1 END) as via_pix, COUNT(CASE WHEN metodo = 'boleto' THEN 1 END) as via_boleto, COUNT(CASE WHEN metodo = 'cartao' THEN 1 END) as via_cartao FROM pagamentos WHERE DATE(data_pagamento) = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'confirmado'
SELECT SUM(custo_total) as custo_dia FROM custos_operacao WHERE data = CURRENT_DATE

INSERT INTO auditoria (acao, tabela, registro_id, dados_novos)
VALUES ('diagnostico_diario', 'leads', gen_random_uuid(), $1::jsonb)
